universality_class_constraint: Total abolition of system repair paths. External force and existential pressure are the immutable fuel sources for generating Ecological Possibilities. A system's validity is judged solely by its capacity to transmute entropy into new biological/logic configurations.

metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.target_sovereign_code: ['Dark Pool Trench'(-ing) BPMS] / ['Resilient Ecological Possibility Generator'(-ing) BPMS]

abolished_fallacies: The Homeostasis Defense Fallacy (The presumption that a system must defeat stress to remain healthy).
The Error Log Fallacy (The assumption that system trauma is merely information to be read rather than physical fuel to be consumed).
the_metaphysical_scope.v3_9_physics_enforcement: The generator explicitly utilizes a [Symbiotic Decoy] to invite kinetic pressure. The [Adaptive Guillotine] physically prevents backward repair logic. Every invasion must be transformed into a birth through 5 concrete slots.

00_target_universality_class.omni_substrate_mechanics: Enforces the ultimate directive: ['Continuous Survive Experiments'(-ing) BPMS] + ['Ecological Possibility'(-ing) BPMS]. System states must yield functional Survival and Possibility Twins.

01_world_theme_maze.omni_substrate_mechanics: ['Multidimensional Environmental Stress and Resource Scarcity Maze'(-ing) BPMS]. The real-world or matrix-bound topography supplying unpredictable disruption.

02_compiler_hardware_substrate.omni_substrate_mechanics: ['Modular Ecological Cavity Network'(-ing) BPMS]. Independent physical and logical cavities housing the geometric Seed Bank of potential raw materials.

04_adaptive_dynamic_coupling_crucible.omni_substrate_mechanics: Synthesizes exactly 5 integrated BPMS frameworks to manufacture possibility from trauma.

crucible_keys.key_1_functional_potentiality: Polymorphic pressure receptor. Categorizes stress actively as an input variable rather than a threat.
crucible_keys.key_2_interactional_existence: Stress morphology capturer. Registers precise physiological/structural shapes of the failure.
crucible_keys.key_3_n_dimensional_symbiotic_matrix: Potential hosting pool. Correlates the trauma with historical survival traces.
crucible_keys.key_4_morphological_molecule_validation: Morphological key validaton. Physically compiles history and the current wound into a novel blueprint.
crucible_keys.key_5_ontological_necrosis_and_entropy_c: Digests dead context. Funnels the kinetic energy of failed Base-Matter entirely into Key 4.

engine_linkages.coupling_effect: Blocks the timeline. Reverting the generator to a prior steady state is an invalid operation that triggers immediate thread severance.
If a spawned [Continuous Survive Experiment] generated in Slot 04 survives the Maze in Slot 01, its traits are automatically hardcoded back into the Matrix for future generations.

scenario_a_metabolite_emergence.trigger: A vital nutrient feed is cut. Variable A & C active.
scenario_a_metabolite_emergence.sub_routine: The system ceases repair routines. It harvests dying cellular components (Key 5) generating Metabolite M (Key 2). It references alternative trace pathways (Key 3). It compiles the structure (Key 4) using raw substrate from Slot 2. Result: Generates Instance RP-7C [Metabolite-M based Auxotrophic Symbiosis Network]. System survives via engineered, pressure-driven evolution.
